message: Spec created from roadmap feature feature-5
Build orchestration started and worktree prepared.
Planning completed and implementation subtasks were generated.

Started subtask 1/4: Create a manifest.json file at the project root with all required PWA fields: name ('My Todo List'), short_name, start_url ('./'), display ('standalone'), theme_color, background_color, and an icons array referencing 192×192 and 512×512 PNG/SVG icon files. No external URLs.

message:
Created `manifest.json` with:

- `name`: "My Todo List"
- `short_name`: "Todos"
- `start_url`: "./"
- `display`: "standalone"
- `theme_color` / `background_color`: `#4a90e2` / `#ffffff`
- `icons`: references to `icon-192.svg` and `icon-512.svg` (to be created in the next subtask) with correct size and type fields

No external URLs are referenced. The file is valid JSON and aligns with the planned icon subtask that will create the SVG files.

Completed subtask 1/4: Create a manifest.json file at the project root with all required PWA fields: name ('My Todo List'), short_name, start_url ('./'), display ('standalone'), theme_color, background_color, and an icons array referencing 192×192 and 512×512 PNG/SVG icon files. No external URLs.

message: Started subtask 2/4: Create two SVG icon files (icon-192.svg and icon-512.svg) representing the app logo — a simple checklist/checkmark motif using the app's blue (#4a90e2) brand color. Reference both in manifest.json with the correct size and type fields. These must be self-contained with no external resources.
